## What changed


## Type of change

- [ ] Registry entry
- [ ] Fix script
- [ ] Website
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Docs or tooling

## Sources

Link related issues, public reports, or fix sources.


## Checklist

- [ ] Registry JSON matches `registry/schema/issue.schema.json`.
- [ ] Fix scripts use TypeScript and Node.
- [ ] Fix scripts do not use third-party dependencies.
- [ ] Fix scripts do not call external websites or endpoints.
- [ ] Fix scripts are idempotent.
- [ ] Fix script changes are reasonably reversible by reinstalling or updating Codex.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks.
